violations.text: Menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Thermometers are lacking inside refrigeration/cold hold unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
Boxes of ice cream cones were observed stored on the floor in the office/storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Utensils observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the soft serve machine observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The floor and wall junctures behind the 3-bay sink and mop sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
